examples: The timbre of the violin is far richer than that of the mouth organ.
His voice had a deep timbre.
Individual animals also have different timbre and use different patterns of emphasis.
On her first day on the job in 2007, Alemany set the timbre of her reign immediately.
The timbre, the trill, the resonant frequency of the Cayman is now much closer to the premium-feeling 911.
